Fani Willis and Judge in Georgia Trump Trial Win Primaries Judge Scott McAfee rebuked District Attorney Fani Willis over her relationship with a subordinate. But he joined her in the primary winner’s circle. - New York Magazine
GOP Moderates Went Extinct. Moderate Democrats Keep Winning. Centrist Democrats sweep in Oregon. - New York Magazine
The Bird-Flu Outbreak Has Spread to a Second Person A Michigan farmworker testing positive for the virus, which continues to rip through U.S. dairy cows. - New York Magazine
Alito Ethics Defense Blown Up by Second Insurrectionist Flag The previous defense was narrowly tailored to facts that are now moot. - New York Magazine

Nikki Haley and the End of the Anti-Trump Republican Fantasy Like many Republicans before her, Haley has recanted her criticism of Trump and endorsed him because she wants a future in the party. - New York Magazine
Is Ticketmaster’s Reign of Terror Really About to End? On Thursday, the Justice Department filed a lawsuit that seeks to break the company up. Here’s what we know. - New York Magazine
The Kennedy Campaign’s Problems Are Piling Up From ballot-access problems to sluggish polls to a controversial running-mate, the independent candidate might already have peaked. - New York Magazine

Eric Adams Applauds NYPD After Violent Arrests of Pro-Palestinian Demonstrators “I take my hat off to the police department,” the mayor said, after cops punched and violently arrested demonstrators in Bay Ridge this weekend. - New York Magazine

What to Know About the New Student-Loan-Forgiveness Plans Biden’s relief measures and proposals are good news for borrowers — if you can figure out their looming deadlines and complexity. - New York Magazine

Trump Plays the Racist Hits at New York Trial Trump appeared to take a shot at Judge Juan Merchan’s heritage Tuesday, saying of the Colombia-born judge, “Take a look at where he comes from.” - New York Magazine
New Video Casts Doubt on Cop’s Claims About Scottie Scheffler It sure doesn’t look like the world’s best golfer dragged a Louisville police officer with his car. - New York Magazine

Why Does the New Kate Middleton Portrait Look Nothing Like Her? The Tatler-commissioned portrait may be trying to capture her “soul,” not her likeness. Or maybe weird royal portraits are just in right now. - New York Magazine
